title: 无标题文章
summary: Today is my last day at Google. I joined as an intern almost 18 years ago, and it still feels like it was yesterday. I'm incredibly grateful that I got to work with so many amazing and talented folks, but I'm also excited (and terrified!) to try something new. First step: a few months of travel and photography :)
content: Today is my last day at Google. I joined as an intern almost 18 years ago, and it still feels like it was yesterday. I'm incredibly grateful that I got to work with so many amazing and talented folks, but I'm also excited (and terrified!) to try something new. First step: a few months of travel and photography :)
